action.reasoning: Observation: Training reached epoch 25 with val AP=0.1810, still improving. Eval from iter 9 failed due to weights_only issue which was fixed. Need to submit eval now to get baseline score. Analysis: Val AP still improving at epoch 25. Each epoch ~44s. With 5.43h remaining and 20 iterations, I should submit eval first, then continue training. The model architecture could also be improved with virtual nodes and larger emb_dim. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, then train 25 more epochs.
